# Klong

> Klong is a tap-to-log time tracker and personal career ledger. Log work in one tap, keep your history across every job, and give teams accurate timesheets with sign-off and rollups.

## What is Klong?

Klong is a web-based time tracking app for individuals and teams. People log hours against projects with a single tap (30 minutes, one hour, or two hours). The personal work history travels with the user across employers; each employer keeps records scoped to their company.

## Key facts

- Free for individuals, forever.
- Company teams: free 60-day trial, then per-seat pricing (TBA).
- No credit card required to start a company trial.
- No auto-charge when a trial ends.
- Career history is personal; employer visibility is limited to that company's logged hours and projects.
- Includes Pomodoro timer, weekly treemap, personal dashboard, team approvals, and timesheet sign-off.

## Frequently asked questions

### Can my employer see my personal dashboard, streaks, or other jobs?

No. Your employer sees what's scoped to their company — the hours and projects logged under their employment. Your personal streaks, other jobs, and full career history are visible only to you.

### What happens after the 60-day trial?

If you haven't subscribed, your company automatically downgrades to individual free accounts — everyone keeps their own history and can keep logging time. You just lose admin/team features until you subscribe. Nothing is deleted, nothing is locked.

### Will I be charged automatically when the trial ends?

No. No card is required to start the trial, and there's no auto-charge — you choose to subscribe when you're ready.

### What will it cost after the trial?

Company pricing is not finalized yet. Trial companies get advance notice and preferred pricing before anything is charged.
